description: Frozen schema pack for HELEN constitutional membrane. All schemas are immutable and version-locked.

schemas.purpose: Sealed constitutive record of a single execution run. Contains only observable, hashable facts. No interpretation.
Structured failure signal for EvoSkill. Contains only observable deltas, not narratives. EvoSkill consumes ONLY this schema.
Formal request to promote a skill mutation. Contains hashes, receipts, and rollback targets—never raw code. Read-only for HELEN.
Binary governance decision on a skill promotion request. Authoritative and ledger-bound. Only HELEN may emit this.
Canonical active-state membrane object. Upstream components may propose changes; only reducer-emitted, ledger-bound decisions may change this state.

constitutional_law: Upstream components may propose skill state changes; only reducer-emitted, ledger-bound decisions may change active skill state.
immutability_guarantee: These schemas are frozen. Any change requires new version number and explicit changelog.
